title: Strange Boarders
writer: Sidney Gilliat, E. Phillips Oppenheim, A.R. Rawlinson
actors: Tom Walls, Renée Saint-Cyr, Googie Withers
plot: Pre-war intelligence man Tommy Blythe interrupts his honeymoon to investigate the discovery of vital Air Ministry blueprints on a woman killed in a London road accident. The trail leads to a boarding house in Notting Hill and its ...
